spec.name: execute_node
spec.description: Execute a Node.js script and return stdout/stderr/exit_code

script.description: The Node.js JavaScript code to execute

spec.implementation_notes: Run: node -e "<script>". Capture stdout, stderr, and exit code. Return as JSON.

request.rationale: Need to perform zlib compression on file data. Python is not available (exit code 9009). Node.js has built-in zlib module and is commonly installed on Windows. This tool will let me read the file, compress with zlib, and output the hex.
